name: Sandy Beach
tagline: Oahu's most notorious shore break — where locals prove themselves and lifeguards stay busy.
bestTime: Best at 2–4 ft swell for bodyboarding; any day for watching from the sand
insiderTips: NOT for beginners — Sandy's sends more people to the ER than any beach on the island. Even on calm days the shore break is deceptive. Great spectator beach though. The grassy hill above is a top-tier kite-flying and hang-gliding spot. Combine with a drive along the scenic Hwy 72 loop.
